title: Excalibur | Copper Age Backport Support
description: A compat pack for excalibur and copper age backport
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Copper Age Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copper-age-backport) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur) resource pack. This just moves where the textures are located.

**Credits:**

*   [Maffhew](https://www.curseforge.com/members/maffhew/projects) – Creator of Excalibur
*   [Smallinger](https://www.curseforge.com/members/smallinger/projects)\- Creator of [Copper Age Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/copper-age-backport)
